props.ChoiceText: You guided high-born hunters through managed woods where tracking, terrain, and quarry mattered more than ceremony alone.
props.ChoiceBio: A lord's forest drive taught you how wilderness knowledge becomes a service when rank enters the trees.

0.TransitionText: Because a noble hunt taught you how quickly wilderness skill can become social display, your eye and patience found a sharper use in the disciplined art of the archer.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a noble hunt taught you how quickly wilderness skill can become social display, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a noble hunt taught you how quickly wilderness skill can become social display, skill in the wild brought you to the notice of people who turned prowess into favor.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.
